decision: Museum/stage shots are limited to proof beats; future work must use varied visual worlds with the same premium natural-history quality.

shot_01.classification: new GPT Image 2 strong hold / visual ceiling; replaces v15 as preferred Shot 1 unless user wants calmer closed-mouth variant

shot_02.classification: GPT Image 2 strong hold; replaces local v16/v17 as preferred proof beat

shot_03.classification: GPT Image 2 hold / likely usable; clear apple-squirrel-nut gag, caption should sell before/not-yet meaning

shot_4_deep_time_timeline.use_for: 400 million years / deep time / before trees timeline beat

shot_5_first_trees_after_sharks.classification: GPT Image 2 HOLD, but not for before-forests
shot_5_first_trees_after_sharks.use_for: first forests appear after sharks / world changes beat

shot_6_present_day_wonder.use_for: present-day viewer / this is still with us / aquarium wonder beat

shot_7_final_survivor.use_for: final line: a survivor from a world before forests

overall_visual_state: GPT Image 2 manual set now covers distinct literal beats; avoid regenerating samey shark-only portraits.
